label: Motivational
description: Tools for moving toward action when avoidance, resistance, or low drive get in the way.

label: Emotional Regulation
description: Skills for riding out intense emotions and shifting unhelpful thought patterns.

label: Cognitive
description: Tools for working with thoughts — examining them, distancing from them, and loosening their grip.

label: Somatic
description: Body-based techniques that calm the nervous system directly through breath and physiology.

label: Relational
description: Skills for difficult conversations, repair, and being heard without damaging the relationship.

label: Existential
description: Approaches to meaning, loss, and the larger questions that surface in grief and transition.

label: Mindfulness
description: Practices of present-moment awareness and kindness toward yourself.
